scale.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-heading font-medium tracking-tight leading-none
scale.label: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-text-muted

effects.grain: url(\"data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.85' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E\")

layout.description: Full-screen standalone CRM layout. Collapsible left sidebar nav. Main content area in center. Right rail for Call Queue.
layout.classes: h-screen w-full bg-[#F9F9F7] flex overflow-hidden font-body relative text-[#111111]

sidebar.description: Minimalist left sidebar. Icons only when collapsed. Hairline right border.
sidebar.classes: w-64 border-r border-[#E5E5E0] bg-white flex flex-col transition-all duration-300 z-10

kpi_card.description: Cardless, subtle hairline borders. Typographic numbers.
kpi_card.classes: border-b border-r border-[#E5E5E0] p-6 bg-transparent hover:bg-white transition-colors duration-200

call_queue_card.description: Looks like an airline boarding pass. Stackable, distinctive right-rail module.
call_queue_card.classes: bg-white border border-[#E5E5E0] rounded-none p-4 shadow-subtle flex flex-col gap-3 relative overflow-hidden before:content-[''] before:absolute before:left-0 before:top-0 before:h-full before:w-1 before:bg-[#0F4C3A]

pipeline_gauge.description: Linear forecast strip adapted to patient pipeline. Sleek, thin lines.
pipeline_gauge.classes: h-2 w-full bg-[#E5E5E0] rounded-none overflow-hidden flex

table.description: Data-dense, editorial table. Monospace numbers, serif patient names.

table_header.classes: text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-[#8A8A85] pb-4 border-b border-[#E5E5E0]

button_primary.classes: bg-[#0F4C3A] text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-none font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#166B52] transition-colors

button_secondary.classes: bg-transparent text-[#111111] border border-[#111111] px-6 py-2 rounded-none font-mono text-sm uppercase tracking-wider hover:bg-[#111111] hover:text-white transition-colors

social_button.classes: w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center border border-[#E5E5E0] hover:border-[#0F4C3A] hover:text-[#0F4C3A] text-[#5C5C59] transition-all bg-white

drawer.description: Slide-over drawer for Patient Intake Form. Bone white background.
drawer.classes: fixed inset-y-0 right-0 w-[500px] bg-[#F9F9F7] shadow-2xl border-l border-[#E5E5E0] z-50 p-8 overflow-y-auto

images.description: Patient Avatar 1 - Man in white shirt
Patient Avatar 3 - Man in grey jacket
Patient Avatar 4 - Person with grey sweater

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard in /app/frontend/src/App.jsx or dedicated components. DO NOT build in .tsx.
Do NOT use any purple/violet colors or gradients.
Do NOT use Inter or Roboto fonts. Stick to Cormorant Garamond (headings), Cabinet Grotesk (body), JetBrains Mono (metrics). Load these via Google Fonts if necessary.
Apply the grain texture globally to the app body via the background-image rule provided in tokens.
Ensure the UI layout has a left navigation sidebar, a central wide data area (KPIs, Pipeline table, AI insights), and a 350px fixed right rail for the 'Call Queue' module.

The Right Rail 'Call Queue' must feature stacked cards resembling airline boarding passes with patient avatars, concern, requested call time, a large 'Call' button (mocking Twilio), and small square social icons.
Include a 'Patients to Escalate' section highlighting AI confidence percentages.
Include the AI Contributor Panel with categorized bullets as specified.
Implement an intake form via a slide-over drawer (Drawer component) with core fields + mock dynamic custom fields.
Implement the 'Schedule on Calendar' dropdown with standard provider options (Outlook, Google, iOS, Calendly).
All interactive elements MUST have role-based data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='call-button-patient-1').
Use Lucide-react for all icons. Do not use emoji.
Use recharts for the Trend/history line chart (AI Forecast vs Actual).
